content.cn_text: [旁白]: 你将听到一个名叫Ravi的学生和他的导师程博士谈论他正在做的研究，这个研究是关于
content.en_text: [Narrator]: You will hear a student called Ravi talking to his tutor, Dr. Cheng, about research he

content.cn_text: 一项关于儿童户外玩耍的作业。
content.en_text: is doing for an assignment on children playing outdoors.

content.cn_text: 你现在有一些时间看第21到26题。
content.en_text: Just you have some time to look at questions 21 to 26.

content.cn_text: [程博士]: 好的，Ravi，告诉我你关于儿童户外玩耍作业的研究进展如何。
content.en_text: [Dr. Cheng]: Right Ravi, tell me how the research for your assignment about children's outdoor

content.cn_text: 进行得怎么样了。
content.en_text: play is going.

content.cn_text: [Ravi]: 是的，我一直在研究为什么现在的孩子比二三十年前花更少的时间在户外玩耍。
content.en_text: [Ravi]: Yes, well I've been reading about why children spend less time playing outside now than 20

content.cn_text: 二三十年前。
content.en_text: or 30 years ago.

content.cn_text: [程博士]: 那么，这仅仅是因为孩子们现在花在网上的时间多了吗？这显然
content.en_text: [Dr. Cheng]: So is it just because of the amount of online time that children have now, which obviously

content.cn_text: 是在室内进行的。
content.en_text: happens indoors?

content.cn_text: [Ravi]: 嗯，如果真是那样，那么高网络使用率和低户外玩耍水平之间就会存在关联。
content.en_text: [Ravi]: Well, if that was the case, there'd be a correlation between high internet use and low levels

content.cn_text: 的户外玩耍。
content.en_text: of outdoor play.

content.cn_text: 而且这与外面是否有足够的设施无关，比如游乐场，
content.en_text: And it's nothing to do with whether there are adequate facilities outside, playgrounds

content.cn_text: 因为任何开放空间都可以。
content.en_text: for example, as any open space will do.

content.cn_text: 也许没有比父母担心街道上的车辆危险更重要的单一因素了。
content.en_text: There's perhaps no single more important factor than parental worries about the dangers

content.cn_text: 街道上的车辆。
content.en_text: of vehicles on the streets.

content.cn_text: [程博士]: 但也可能是现在的孩子更喜欢在室内玩耍而不是户外玩耍？
content.en_text: [Dr. Cheng]: But it could also be that children today prefer playing indoors to outdoors?

content.cn_text: [Ravi]: 嗯，东京的一项研究表明情况恰恰相反。
content.en_text: [Ravi]: Well a study in Tokyo suggests it's the other way around.

content.cn_text: 但孩子们现在花在有组织的活动和校外俱乐部的时间比以前更多了。
content.en_text: But children are spending more time in structured activities and out of school clubs than before.

content.cn_text: 这对外出玩耍的时间产生了连锁反应。
content.en_text: And this has a knock on effect on what's left for outdoor play.

content.cn_text: [程博士]: 你的前提是户外玩耍是好的。
content.en_text: [Dr. Cheng]: Your premise is that outdoor play is good.

content.cn_text: 你的作业具体想重点关注什么？
content.en_text: What exactly do you want to focus on in your assignment?

content.cn_text: [Ravi]: 嗯，不太关注那些适用于一般运动的事情，比如孩子们的肌肉
content.en_text: [Ravi]: Well, not so much on things that apply to exercise in general, like children's muscles

content.cn_text: 因为跑来跑去而变得更强壮。
content.en_text: getting stronger because they run around.

content.cn_text: 而且不关注那些显而易见的事情，比如户外玩耍有助于孩子们集中注意力
content.en_text: And not on what seems, for instance, self-evident, that outdoor play helps children to concentrate

content.cn_text: 在学习以外的事情上。
content.en_text: on things other than lessons.

content.cn_text: [程博士]: 当然。
content.en_text: [Dr. Cheng]: Sure.

content.cn_text: [Ravi]: 我想研究一些更意想不到的好处，比如对儿童消化系统的影响。
content.en_text: [Ravi]: I'd like to investigate some of the more unexpected benefits like to children's digestion.

content.cn_text: 这是因为新鲜空气往往会刺激饥饿感。
content.en_text: This is because fresh air tends to stimulate hunger.

content.cn_text: 也许我们可以把爬树是否能帮助孩子认识
content.en_text: Perhaps leaving to one side the question of whether climbing trees helps educate children

content.cn_text: 自然界的问题放在一边。
content.en_text: about the natural world.

content.cn_text: [程博士]: 不，不太相关。
content.en_text: [Dr. Cheng]: No, not really relevant.

content.cn_text: 户外游戏和活动迫使孩子们做出什么样的决定？
content.en_text: What sort of decisions do outdoor games and activities force children to make?

content.cn_text: [Ravi]: 嗯，例如，他们如何判断某件事可能有多危险。
content.en_text: [Ravi]: Well, for example, how they decide how dangerous something might be.

content.cn_text: 我希望能概述一下这方面的主要发现。
content.en_text: I'd like to outline the main findings on that.

content.cn_text: [程博士]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Dr. Cheng]: Okay.

content.cn_text: 既然你认为过去一代人的玩耍模式发生了转变，
content.en_text: And as you're arguing that there's been a shift in play patterns over the last generation

content.cn_text: 你将如何证实这一点？
content.en_text: or so, how are you going to substantiate this?

content.cn_text: [Ravi]: 是的。
content.en_text: [Ravi]: Yes.

content.cn_text: 调查比较了父母对30年前自己童年玩耍的回忆与
content.en_text: Surveys have compared parents' recollections of their childhood play 30 years ago with

content.cn_text: 他们的孩子现在所做的。
content.en_text: what their children do now.

content.cn_text: 孩子们在户外玩耍的方式也发生了变化。
content.en_text: And the nature of what children do when they are playing outdoors has changed.

content.cn_text: [程博士]: 具体是怎样变化的？
content.en_text: [Dr. Cheng]: How exactly?

content.cn_text: [Ravi]: 嗯，令人惊讶的是，这并不太关乎孩子们多久玩一次户外活动，或者对
content.en_text: [Ravi]: Well, surprisingly, it's not so much how often children play outside or preferences for

content.cn_text: 大或小群体玩耍的偏好。
content.en_text: large or small groups.

content.cn_text: 而是玩耍的时间不再那么长了。
content.en_text: But the fact that the play sessions don't go on for as long.

content.cn_text: 而那种一个孩子追另一个想逃跑的追逐游戏，这些
content.en_text: And games involving one child running after another who tries to get away, these are

content.cn_text: 仍然和以前一样受欢迎。
content.en_text: still as popular as ever.

content.cn_text: 但有一点下降的是即兴游戏。
content.en_text: But one thing that is declined is improvised games.

content.cn_text: 我想研究一下这可能是什么原因。
content.en_text: And I'd like to examine why this might be.

content.cn_text: [程博士]: 有趣。
content.en_text: [Dr. Cheng]: Interesting.

content.cn_text: 那安全方面呢？
content.en_text: And what about safety?

content.cn_text: [Ravi]: 嗯，根据我的阅读，严重的事故仍然很少见。
content.en_text: [Ravi]: Well, from my reading, serious accidents are still rare.

content.cn_text: 孩子们从床上摔下来受伤的比从树上摔下来受伤的还多。
content.en_text: More kids hurt themselves falling out of bed than out of trees.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 在你听完剩余的讨论之前，你有一些时间看第27
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Before you hear the rest of the discussion, you have some time to look at questions 27

content.cn_text: 到30题。
content.en_text: to 30.

content.cn_text: 现在，听并回答第27到30题。
content.en_text: Now, listen and answer a questions 27 to 30.

content.cn_text: [Ravi]: 我认为户外玩耍的减少是父母应该担心的一个问题。
content.en_text: [Ravi]: I think that a client of outdoor play is a problem which should worry parents.

content.cn_text: 我的意思是，也许孩子们自己并不怀念它。
content.en_text: I mean, perhaps the children themselves don't miss it.

content.cn_text: 他们可能很高兴花很多时间在室内。
content.en_text: They may be happy to spend lots of time indoors.

content.cn_text: 但久坐不动与成年后身体问题之间的联系已经如此明确，
content.en_text: But the links between inactivity and physical problems when their adults are so well established

content.cn_text: 所以我认为应该鼓励孩子们和他们的兄弟姐妹
content.en_text: that I think kids should be encouraged to spend more time outdoors with their brothers

content.cn_text: 和朋友们多花时间在户外。
content.en_text: and sisters and friends.

content.cn_text: [程博士]: 学校呢？
content.en_text: [Dr. Cheng]: What about schools?

content.cn_text: [Ravi]: 嗯，我认为他们在户外玩耍方面应该做些不同的事情，而且这实际上并不需要
content.en_text: [Ravi]: Well, what I think they should do differently regarding outdoor play and it wouldn't actually

content.cn_text: 大量的开支，而是应该将政策建立在不同的成果上，比如培养
content.en_text: require a great deal of expenditure is base their policy on different outcomes, like developing

content.cn_text: 孩子们的自信心，而不仅仅是考虑考试成绩，尽管我不知道
content.en_text: children's confidence, not just thinking about exam results, although I don't know how

content.cn_text: 家长们会怎么看。
content.en_text: it would go down with the parents.

content.cn_text: [程博士]: 那么，农村地区的孩子是否能更多地接触大自然呢？
content.en_text: [Dr. Cheng]: And do children get more contact with nature in rural areas?

content.cn_text: [Ravi]: Smith和Barker对此有研究。
content.en_text: [Ravi]: There's research on this by Smith and Barker.

content.cn_text: 直观上，你会期望农村地区的儿童在户外度过更多时间，但
content.en_text: Intuitively, you'd expect children in rural areas to spend more time out in the open, but

content.cn_text: 实际上，他们通常被告知要远离农田。
content.en_text: in fact, they are generally told to keep off agricultural land.

content.cn_text: 此外，在城镇和城市以外的地区，监管也存在困难。
content.en_text: Plus, there are difficulties with supervision outside towns and cities.

content.cn_text: [程博士]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Dr. Cheng]: Right.

content.cn_text: Smith和Barker的论文发表于2001年。
content.en_text: And Smith and Barker's paper was published in 2001.

content.cn_text: 虽然不是最新的，但仍然有效可用，但你需要非常精确地指出
content.en_text: Not the most up-to-date, but still valid to use, but you'll need to stipulate very precisely

content.cn_text: 如果我没记错的话，他们的研究重点只在农村地区。
content.en_text: that their focus was, if I remember correctly, just on rural areas.

content.cn_text: 所以你需要考虑他们的这些有限的发现在多大程度上适用于城市地区
content.en_text: So you'd need to consider how far their restricted findings might be applicable to urban areas

content.cn_text: 也一样。
content.en_text: as well.

content.cn_text: [Ravi]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Ravi]: OK.

content.cn_text: [程博士]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Dr. Cheng]: Right.

content.cn_text: 所以现在我建议你制作一个你将要涵盖内容的概述。
content.en_text: So now I'd suggest you produce an overview of what you're going to cover.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 第三部分到此结束。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: That is the end of part three.

content.cn_text: 你现在有30秒的时间检查第三部分的答案。
content.en_text: You now have 30 seconds to check your answers to part three.

groups.title: Questions 27-30.

items.title: Ravi thinks parents should be more concerned about the decline of outdoor play because

options.title: B
options.content: It leads to health problems later in life.

items.title: What does Ravi say that schools should do with regard to outdoor play?

options.title: C
options.content: Listen to the views of parents.

items.title: What did Smith and Barker say about children in rural areas?

options.title: A
options.content: They tend not to be allowed on farmland.

options.title: C
options.content: They spend more time outdoors than city children.

items.title: What problem does Dr Chang highlight about Smith and Barker’s research?

options.title: B
options.content: It is too old to be useful.
